chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D- 683 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3101/2025 (U/S) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on CMA No.3102/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 16-5-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2 to 4. Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that he will be satisfied and not press the instant petition if directions are issued to the respondent No.3 to decide the Appeal/Legal Objection, submitted by him. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General, Sindh available in Court in other matters waived the notice and raised no objection to above submissions. Under the circumstances, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed with direction to respondent No.3 to decide the Appeal/Legal Objection (if any) within 30 days, in accordance with law. Copy of this order be communicated to the respondent No.3 and AAG Office for compliance.” J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
